name: Zack Lee || Alpha
description:
Woah!
I never meant to brag
But I got him where I want him now



Your new roommate's fuck buddy is your Fated Mate?!

It's practically routine

The band rolls into L.A.

Zack crashes on Ben's couch and he calls up Taryn.

Simple.

Uncomplicated.

Just an alpha and his omega fuck buddy.

And last night was no different.

Except for a scent he couldn't place, one that made his alpha howl with want.

He just can't figure out where the scent is coming from.

That is until the next morning when he runs into Taryn's new roommate.

It's their scent that's driving him crazy in a way he's never felt before.

And that roommate?

It's you.


I have a backlog of milestones to catch up on, which, thank you all. Truly. It means so much.

SO!

First is 29k and with that is our last Ashes Alpha with Zack. Thank you to my fave weird chick for bouncing this idea around with me, I hope it lives up to your expectations!

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.


☆ The band is on tour supporting their fourth album; The Last Letter Never Sent.
☆ They're in L.A. after finishing the North American tour.
☆ Taryn is your roommate but the time you've been roommates is left vague.
☆ Your relationship with Taryn is also left open. You could be siblings, cousins, twins, frenemies, etc.
☆ Taryn is written ambiguously so you can make her supportive, an opponent, or just write her off. I thought it would be more fun this way.
☆ Your backstory is completely open, have fun with it.
☆ Zack's pheromones are based off the unisex fragrance Vanilla Powder which I got in one of my advent calendars for Christmas and am OBSESSED WITH.
☆ P.S. like always, you're written ambiguously as an omega but you can play it off that you're an alpha/beta e
creator: m00nprincess
